capabilities: Define and validate success metrics for input adaptation in tools, ensuring error-free operations and valid results.

procedure.action: Capture input specifications using domain-specific tools, ensuring error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail for traceability.
Assert captured specifications with domain-appropriate tools, confirming error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; ensure operation_duration_ms and result_code are logged to audit trail.
Specify criteria and metrics using domain-specific tools, ensuring error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail for compliance.
Assert procedure output with domain-specific tools, confirming error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; ensure operation_duration_ms and result_code are logged to audit trail.

summary: Establish success metrics for input adaptation in tools by defining criteria, metrics, and validation steps, ensuring error-free and valid results.
title: Input Adaptation Success Metrics for Tools

failureConditions: Invalid results when error_count exceeds threshold, causing inaccurate adaptations and potential tool failures.
Audit trail gaps when operation_duration_ms and result_code are not logged, causing traceability issues in adaptation processes.
metrics: captured specifications with domain-appropriate tools, confirming error_count < 1 and result_valid = true
procedure output with domain-specific tools, confirming error_count < 1 and result_valid = true
successConditions: result_code in [200, 201]; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
